string.text: This gun has been modified with a new upper reciever, hand guard, barrel, and gas system. The lower reciever has been modified to accept STANAG pattern magazines. The rate of fire has been upgraded and the compact size have made it ideal for urban combat. Accessories include a laser designator an Zone modified Devo kit that allows for thermal imaging and a Holosun 510 red dot sight.

This kit includes all the parts necessary to convert a G36 into a G36c. Parts included are a new upper reciever, hand guard, barrel, and gas system. The lower reciever has been modified to accept STANAG pattern magazines. The rate of fire has been upgraded and the compact size have made it ideal for urban combat. Accessories include a laser designator an Zone modified Devo kit that allows for thermal imaging and a Holosun 510 red dot sight.
